summary: Activity Tab Bug Fixes VERIFIED - All reported issues fixed: (1) Activity tab loads without freezing - uses FlatList with virtualization, limit=50, API responds in <0.3s; (2) Login persistence - timeout extended to 10s safety net, AsyncStorage stores token/user; (3) Card view events use correct card_type (birthday_card_viewed, thankyou_card_viewed, etc.); (4) Short URL dedup window reduced to 5 minutes.

issues: Console warnings: 'Unexpected text node' x24 - minor React Native web compatibility issues, not affecting functionality

activity_feed_performance.details: GET /api/contacts/{userId}/master-feed?limit=50 returns 50 events in 0.23 seconds (under 2s requirement)

activity_tab_rendering.details: FlatList virtualization with 52px avatars, 16px names, chevron-forward arrows on each item

activity_tab_navigation.details: TouchableOpacity items navigate to /contact/{contact.id} on click

activity_auto_refresh.details: 30-second interval configured in useEffect at line 101-105

login_persistence_timeout.details: Timeout extended from 2s to 10s at line 57 of index.tsx

login_asyncstorage.details: authStore.ts stores token and user in AsyncStorage on login, loadAuth reads on mount

card_type_event_logging.details: congrats_cards.py line 398-409 uses card_type-specific event names (birthday_card_viewed, thankyou_card_viewed, etc.)

short_url_dedup_window.details: short_urls.py line 172: timedelta(minutes=5) - reduced from 1 hour to 5 minutes

login_api.details: POST /api/auth/login returns token and user data correctly

verified_features: Activity tab FlatList virtualization with initialNumToRender=15, maxToRenderPerBatch=10, windowSize=5
Activity feed limit reduced from 100 to 50 items
loadAuth called on mount in index.tsx
Card type-specific event logging (birthday_card_viewed, thankyou_card_viewed, etc.)
critical_code_review_comments: activity.tsx: FlatList with proper virtualization settings (removeClippedSubviews=true)
activity.tsx: 52px avatars and 16px names as specified in requirements
activity.tsx: Chevron arrows on each item for tappable indication
authStore.ts: Proper AsyncStorage persistence for token and user
congrats_cards.py: Card type-specific event mapping at lines 401-408

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Activity tab loads, renders correctly, navigation works)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Activity tab bug fixes verified: (1) FlatList virtualization prevents freezing, (2) login timeout extended to 10s, (3) card type events use correct names, (4) short URL dedup is 5 minutes. Console shows 'Unexpected text node' warnings which are minor React Native web compatibility issues not affecting functionality.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - not testing actual SMS sending
